description:
As a librarian
  I want to see the catalog
  So that I can check book availability

elements.name: List all books sorted by title

steps.name: the librarian requests the book catalog
the books are sorted by title alphabetically

elements.name: Get a single book with queue depth

steps.name: the book has a queue_depth field
the librarian requests the book with id "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
the error message is "Book not found"

elements.name: Available copies count with active loans

steps.name: the librarian requests the book catalog
the book "Dune" shows 3 available of 4 copies

name: Catalog browsing

description:
As a librarian
  I want to collect fines
  So that late returns are penalized

steps.name: Alice Johnson has an unpaid fine of $3.50
the librarian requests Alice's member profile
Alice Johnson has an unpaid fine of $3.50
the fine is marked as paid

elements.name: Cannot pay an already paid fine

steps.name: Alice Johnson has a fine that is already paid
the librarian tries to pay that fine again
the error message is "Fine already paid"

name: Collecting fines

description:
As a librarian
  I want to lend a book to a member
  So that members can borrow library materials

steps.name: Alice Johnson tries to borrow another book
the error message is "Loan limit reached"

elements.name: Reject borrowing when member is suspended

steps.name: the error message is "Member is suspended"

elements.name: Reject borrowing when outstanding fines exceed $5

steps.name: Alice Johnson has unpaid fines of $5.01
the error message is "Outstanding fines exceed limit"

elements.name: Reject borrowing when no copies available

steps.name: the error message is "No copies available — reserve instead"

name: Lending books

description:
As a librarian
  I want to add books and members
  So that the library catalog stays up to date

steps.name: the librarian creates a book with title "The Hobbit", author "J.R.R. Tolkien", ISBN "978-0547928227", and 4 copies
a book with ISBN "978-0441172719" already exists
the librarian creates a book with ISBN "978-0441172719"
the error message is "ISBN already exists"
the librarian creates a member with name "Bob Smith" and email "bob@example.com"
a member with email "carol@example.com" already exists
the librarian creates a member with name "Carol Dup" and email "carol@example.com"
the error message is "Email already exists"

name: Adding books and members

description:
As a librarian
  I want members to reserve unavailable books
  So that they are notified when copies become available

elements.name: Cannot reserve book already on loan

steps.name: the error message is "Member already has this book on loan"
Bob Smith tries to reserve "Dune" again

elements.name: Notified member can borrow while others cannot

steps.name: the book is returned and Bob Smith is notified

elements.name: Expired notifications notify next in queue

steps.name: the book is returned and Bob Smith is notified

name: Reservations

description:
As a librarian
  I want to record returns and fines
  So that overdue books are penalized

steps.name: the loan is marked as returned

elements.name: Return a book late creates a fine

steps.name: a fine of $1.50 is created for the loan

elements.name: Reject returning an already returned loan

steps.name: Alice Johnson has already returned the loan
Alice Johnson tries to return the same loan again
the error message is "Loan already returned"

name: Returns and fines
